rationale: The cited paper appears only as part of a grouped methodological citation when the authors describe using propensity score matching in Study 3 (alongside Heckman et al. 1998). The citing paper does not discuss Huang et al.'s Wal-Mart context, findings, or specific modeling contributions, and it does not assign this paper a distinct conceptual or empirical role. Its function is a passing example/reference for a common method rather than a meaningful building block of the article's argument.
